case_title: SANCHEZ, MARTHA et al vs. CERNA, VIVIAN L. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CERNA, VIVIAN L. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2758 - 28TH ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL OCT-01-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE BY 10/1/96, PLTF. WILL HAVE AN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR $3675. SEE JUDGMENT FOR OTHER CONDIT- IONS.
